body:
Hi Armaan,

We are delighted to extend an offer for the Software Engineering Intern role on the Search Infrastructure team at Google, based in Mountain View, for Summer 2026.

Compensation: $10,500 / month, housing stipend, relocation. Please review the attached offer letter and countersign via DocuSign by May 5.

Welcome aboard,
Alex Kim
University Recruiting, Google
subject: Your Google Summer 2026 internship offer
